quote: Progress is impossible without change, and those who cannot change their minds cannot change anything. – George Bernard Shaw
fact: Mosquito repellents don`t repel. They hide you. The spray blocks the mosquito`s sensors so they don`t know you`re there.
tip: Use keyboard shortcuts to save time.
joke: What do you call a fake noodle? An impasta.
